summary: Broaden saved-mode type candidate ownership matching by merging ownership directly from the current save record and by matching rarity/base/ORIGINS aliases.
bugClassification: Saved-mode type candidate ownership matching false negatives
rootCause: The provided save data contains many owned generals/equipment, but the provided IssueLog was produced by an older Update07.x build. Current source also still had a weak point: type candidates relied on state.savedModeIndex only and exact normalized names, so stale indexes or save/candidate naming variants such as base names, rarity-prefixed names, readings, and ORIGINS labels could under-count saved candidates compared with all-data mode.
externalizationDecision: No HTML/CSS change. The saved-mode candidate logic remains in external JavaScript.

aliasExamples: 【三國志 覇道】LR司馬師（しばし）
candidateMatchingFix.zeroScorePolicy: Saved-owned candidate rows remain visible even when matchedCount is zero.

minimumUserAcceptance: Import the provided save data, switch to saved-data mode, open type candidates for ワクチン型, and confirm owned generals/equipment appear beyond the previously tiny matched-score-only counts.
